description: A stylized illustration of a young woman with flowing dark hair and a red flower, pressing her face against the muzzle of a large lion in an intimate embrace. The woman wears or is merged with large red butterfly wings decorated with intricate patterns. The lion's mane flows in elaborate curving lines of gold and brown. The background is dark, making the warm red and gold tones of the figures stand out. The overall style is highly decorative with sinuous Art Nouveau-influenced linework.

_meta.title: Colecção VOO NA BORBOLETA DA TUA FALÉSIA XII
